calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Documents Under Seal [C.R.C. 2.551]
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ALISA J. KIM, ESQ., Tel No. 415-826-9160 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WESTMED COLLEGE'S Motion To File Documents Under Seal (C.R.C. 2.551) is granted. No opposition was filed and the moving party demonstrates good cause for the relief under CRC 2.550. The clerk of the court is instructed to remove from the public record the amended complaint that was filed on October 18, 2013, and replace that filing with a redacted copy of the amended complaint that is attached as exhibit A to the declaration of Michael Kahn that was filed on February 16, 2016. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Documents Under Seal [C.R.C. 2.551]

Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
